hero.subtitle: A family-run eco-homestay in the heart of Agra. Real home-cooked food, a host who cares, and a terrace that turns golden at sunrise.

rooms.heading: Choose Your
rooms.subtitle: Five room types for every traveller — private flats, couples, families, and solo backpackers. All include free WiFi, filtered water, and Aneesh & Bhavna's signature hospitality.
rooms.notSureTitle: Not sure which room is right for you?
rooms.notSureSubtitle: WhatsApp Aneesh directly and he'll recommend the best option for your group size and budget.
rooms.pageSubtitle: Four room types for every traveller — from dorm beds to a private 2BHK flat. All include free WiFi, filtered water, and Aneesh & Bhavna's signature hospitality. Book direct — no OTA commission.

footer.tagline: A family-run eco-homestay in Agra where every guest is treated as family. 6 km from the Taj Mahal East Gate. A lifetime from the ordinary.
